registration.1: Client generates identity key pair (X25519/ECDSA P-256)
registration.4: Client uploads public keys to server via POST /api/v1/encryption/keys

session_establishment.1: Alice requests Bob's pre-key bundle via GET /api/v1/encryption/prekey-bundle/{user_id}
session_establishment.2: Server returns Bob's identity key, signed pre-key, and one unused one-time pre-key
session_establishment.3: Alice performs X3DH key agreement with Bob's keys
session_establishment.5: Double Ratchet initialized for forward secrecy
